step4.title: Ordering & Inspection
step4.description: Once ordered, we monitor production and conduct rigorous quality inspections.

step5.title: Logistics & Delivery
step5.description: We manage the entire shipping and customs clearance process until goods reach your door.

hero.label: Founded to be the Best
hero.description: Rabzan combines traditional wisdom with logistics innovation to offer you trade solutions that know no impossible.

story.label: Our Inspiring Story
story.legacy_text: Started from ports to conquer markets with engineering precision.
story.p1: We realized from the start that trade is not just numbers and contracts, but a pulse of life and continuous movement requiring extreme precision and deep understanding of cultures and markets.
story.p2: Since our inception, our goal has been to remove obstacles for ambitious companies by providing flexible, secure, and carefully studied supply chains, allowing our partners to focus on their growth while we ensure the quality and speed of their product arrival.

values_section.label: Our Vision & Values
values_section.title: The Foundations We Build Your Success On

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Empowering global trade through innovative sourcing solutions and ethical logistics that put the client first.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the most trusted link in international trade, setting new standards for logistics excellence.

values.title: Our Values
values.text: Integrity, absolute transparency, and commitment to building sustainable partnerships beyond just business transactions.

1.name: Automatic Packaging Machines
1.description: Integrated production lines for food and liquid packaging with top global quality standards.
1.long_description: We offer the latest automated packaging lines designed to increase production efficiency and reduce waste. These machines feature smart PLC control, touch screens for easy operation, and a durable stainless steel structure ensuring longevity and compliance with global health standards.
features: Adjustable production speed up to 120 packs/min
High filling accuracy with error less than ±1%
Easy maintenance and cleaning due to modular design

2.name: High Efficiency Solar Panels
2.description: Latest energy-saving solar technologies, ideal for factories and large projects.
2.long_description: Solar panels designed to maximize solar radiation usage even in harsh weather conditions. Utilizing Mono PERC technology to increase efficiency and reduce thermal loss, making them the ideal choice for commercial and industrial projects seeking to cut energy costs.
features: Superior resistance to wind and snow loads
Tempered glass with anti-reflective and self-cleaning coating

3.name: Luxury Sanitary Ware & Ceramic
3.description: Modern designs and durable materials for heavy use, direct supply from top factories.
3.long_description: A carefully selected collection of sanitary ware, ceramic, and porcelain combining luxury and practicality. We provide Italian and Spanish designs at competitive prices, suitable for residential and hotel projects, with guarantees against corrosion, stains, and for easy cleaning.
features: Modern designs following latest decor trends
Water-saving technologies in mixers and toilets
Available in Big Slabs for floors

4.name: Eco-friendly Plastic Packaging
4.description: Sustainable and biodegradable packaging solutions meeting global environmental standards.
4.long_description: Responding to the growing global demand for sustainability, we provide packaging materials made from bio-plastics that are fully biodegradable. Our products include shopping bags, food containers, and industrial packaging films, maintaining durability and strength.
features: Certified by global environmental bodies (BPI, DIN)

5.name: LED Lighting for Projects
5.description: Smart, energy-saving lighting systems for administrative buildings and industrial facilities.
5.long_description: Integrated LED lighting solutions for major projects, from street and stadium lights to office and warehouse lighting. Features up to 80% energy savings compared to traditional lighting, with a long lifespan reducing maintenance costs.

6.name: Heavy Equipment Spare Parts
6.description: Supplying original and equivalent spare parts for top global brands with high delivery accuracy.
6.long_description: We are your trusted partner for supplying heavy equipment spare parts (excavators, loaders, trucks) from global brands like Caterpillar, Komatsu, and Mercedes. We offer OEM and high-quality Aftermarket options to ensure equipment continuity with minimal cost and downtime.
features: Fast air freight for urgent orders

1.name: Li-ion Batteries 18650
1.description: High-capacity battery cells suitable for various electronic devices and power banks, direct from top factories.
1.long_description: These 18650 Lithium-ion batteries are manufactured to the highest safety and performance standards. Ideal for custom battery pack assembly, high-power flashlights, EVs, and energy storage systems.

2.name: Monocrystalline Solar Panels 550W
2.description: High-efficiency solar modules for commercial and residential projects with 25-year performance warranty.
2.long_description: Our Monocrystalline Solar Panels deliver maximum power output even in low-light conditions. Engineered with half-cell technology for reduced losses and increased durability.

3.name: Luxury SPC Flooring
3.description: Waterproof and highly durable flooring in various wood and stone designs, perfect for commercial projects.
3.long_description: SPC (Stone Polymer Composite) flooring combines the strength of stone with the beauty of wood. 100% waterproof, slip-resistant, and suitable for high-traffic areas.

4.name: Clear Tempered Glass
4.description: High-quality safety glass for windows, doors, and facades, available in custom thicknesses and sizes.
4.long_description: Tempered glass is thermally treated to increase its strength and resistance to thermal shock. In case of breakage, it shatters into small blunt pieces to minimize injury risk.

5.name: LED Warehouse Lighting (High Bay)
5.description: Energy-efficient industrial lighting solutions for warehouses and factories with high ceilings.
5.long_description: UFO LED High Bay lights provide bright and uniform illumination for large spaces. Featuring die-cast aluminum housing for efficient heat dissipation and long lifespan.

6.name: OEM Auto Parts
6.description: Supply of genuine and spec-compliant spare parts for major global car brands.
6.long_description: We specialize in wholesale supply of automotive spare parts, including engine components, suspension, brakes, and electrical parts. Ensuring quality and perfect fit.

hero.label: Our Services
hero.description: We offer a comprehensive range of services designed to streamline your import journey, from source to warehouse.

hero.label: Smart Workflow Methodology
hero.title: We Work With
hero.description: Our systematic approach is divided into clear stages ensuring transparency and full control over every part of the supply journey.

faq.title: Have Questions? We Have Answers.
faq.description: We have compiled the most common inquiries to clearer clarity on our vision.

items.q: How long does the executive process usually take?
items.a: Timelines vary based on product type and geography, but most projects are completed within 4 to 8 weeks from initial consultation to final delivery.

items.q: What order sizes can you handle?
items.a: We specialize in medium to large volume shipments, Full Container Loads (FCL), and have the capacity to scale for major factory needs.

items.q: How do you ensure product quality in remote factories?
items.a: Our field inspection team conducts rigorous checks in three stages: Pre-production, During Production, and Pre-shipment to ensure specification compliance.

items.q: Do you provide periodic follow-up reports?
items.a: Yes, we provide full transparency via detailed weekly reports including photos and live data on manufacturing and logistics status.
